steps.expression: async () => { const startedAt = Date.now(); while (Date.now() - startedAt < 1500) { if (document.body.textContent?.includes('Loading settings...') === true) { return false; } const providersTitle = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.settings-accordion-title')).some((element) => element.textContent?.trim() === 'Providers'); if (providersTitle) { return true; } await new Promise((resolve) => window.setTimeout(resolve, 25)); } return false; }

async () => { const originalGetView = window.api.settings.getView; const originalRefresh = window.api.providers.refreshModelCatalog; const initial = await originalGetView({ viewKind: 'settings' }); if (!initial.ok) { return false; } const injectedModelId = `diag-refresh-${Date.now()}`; let refreshed = false; window.api.providers.refreshModelCatalog = async (request) => { refreshed = true; return { ok: true, value: { modelCatalog: { ...initial.value.modelCatalog, snapshotId: `diag-snapshot-${Date.now()}`, modelsByProvider: { ...initial.value.modelCatalog.modelsByProvider, gemini: [...(initial.value.modelCatalog.modelsByProvider.gemini ?? []), injectedModelId] } } } }; }; window.api.settings.getView = async (request) => { const result = await originalGetView(request); if (!result.ok || !refreshed) { return result; } return { ok: true, value: { ...result.value, canRefreshModels: true, modelCatalog: { ...result.value.modelCatalog, snapshotId: `diag-snapshot-${Date.now()}`, modelsByProvider: { ...result.value.modelCatalog.modelsByProvider, gemini: [...(result.value.modelCatalog.modelsByProvider.gemini ?? []), injectedModelId] } } } }; }; localStorage.setItem('diagInjectedSettingsModelId', injectedModelId); return true; }

async () => { const title = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.settings-accordion-title')).find((element) => element.textContent?.trim() === 'General'); const generalTrigger = title?.closest('button'); if (!(generalTrigger instanceof HTMLButtonElement)) { return false; } generalTrigger.click(); await new Promise((resolve) => window.setTimeout(resolve, 50)); return true; }

async () => { const resolveTrigger = () => { const title = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.settings-accordion-title')).find((element) => element.textContent?.trim() === 'General'); const trigger = title?.closest('button'); return trigger instanceof HTMLButtonElement ? trigger : null; }; const isOpen = () => resolveTrigger()?.closest('[data-state]')?.getAttribute('data-state') === 'open'; if (!isOpen()) { return false; } const refreshButton = document.querySelector('button[aria-label="Refresh global model options"]'); if (!(refreshButton instanceof HTMLButtonElement)) { return false; } refreshButton.disabled = false; refreshButton.click(); const startedAt = Date.now(); while (Date.now() - startedAt < 2000) { const stillOpen = isOpen(); const loadingVisible = document.body.textContent?.includes('Loading settings...') ?? false; if (stillOpen && !loadingVisible) { await new Promise((resolve) => window.setTimeout(resolve, 50)); return true; } await new Promise((resolve) => window.setTimeout(resolve, 50)); } return false; }
